purpose: Record the focused Melee & Close Combat sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.actionSpeedMutation: When a feat changes the action cost of an established combat action, model it as ACTION_SPEED_MUTATION metadata and expose it through ActionSpeedFeatResolver after workflow validation.
policy.alreadyCovered: Great Cleave is already normalized by core combat reaction hooks as an EXTRA_ATTACK_LIMIT_OVERRIDE for Cleave. Extra Rage and Controlled Rage are already handled by Rage feat normalization.
policy.invalidEntries: Do not implement Improved Knock Prone or Knock Prone as feats. They were rejected by the strict Combat validity audit.

implementedEntries.name: Accelerated Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: Once per encounter, when the workflow confirms only proficient weapons are being used, mutates fullAttack from full-round to standard.

alreadyImplementedElsewhere.name: Great Cleave
alreadyImplementedElsewhere.reason: Core combat reaction normalization already provides the Cleave limit override.

alreadyImplementedElsewhere.name: Extra Rage
alreadyImplementedElsewhere.reason: Rage feat normalization already handles daily rage use expansion.

alreadyImplementedElsewhere.name: Controlled Rage
alreadyImplementedElsewhere.reason: Rage feat normalization already handles controlled/swift rage action metadata.

excludedEntries.name: Improved Knock Prone
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.

excludedEntries.name: Knock Prone
excludedEntries.reason: Invalid as SWSE feat per strict Combat validity audit.
